# terrible_community_libvirt_virt (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `flags` (String) Pass additional parameters. Currently only implemented with command `undefine`. Specify which metadata should be removed with `undefine`. Useful option to be able to `undefine` guests with UEFI nvram. `nvram` and `keep_nvram` are conflicting and mutually exclusive. Consider option `force` if all related metadata should be removed.
- `force` (Boolean) Enforce an action. Currently only implemented with command `undefine`. This option can be used instead of providing all `flags`. If `true`, `undefine` removes also any related nvram or other metadata, if existing. If `false` or not set, `undefine` executes only if there is no nvram or other metadata existing. Otherwise the task fails and the guest is kept defined without change. `true` and option `flags` should not be provided together. In this case `undefine` ignores `true`, considers only `flags` and issues a warning.

### Read-Only

- `list_vms` (String) The list of vms defined on the remote system.
- `status` (String) The status of the VM, among running, crashed, paused and shutdown.
